description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs: build_autoconf and build_cmake. The build_autoconf job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the repository, compile and run examples with cmake, compile and run tests, and perform a distcheck. The build_cmake job should use a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-latest and windows-latest, set up a Release build environment, check out the repository, configure CMake, and build the project.
